treatment_information.specific_treatment: Counseling about diet/exercise and consideration of statin therapy
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient counseled; no changes made to medications

treatment_timeline.event: Patient experienced a syncopal episode lasting 5 seconds
Patient admitted to hospital for evaluation of loss of consciousness
Patient underwent EKG, echocardiogram, and blood tests
Patient was counseled about diet/exercise and statin therapy

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up with PCP in a couple of weeks
